title: Leo Puddlejump's Bumpy Ride
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Leo wants to be perfect, but his unicycle is wobbly. A heartwarming story about overcoming perfectionism, embracing mistakes, and the joy of resilience.

title: Leo Puddlejump and the Silent Stage
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: A story about finding your voice, helping a friend, and discovering true bravery. Perfect for shy children or those facing a fear of speaking up.

title: Leo Puddlejump's Upside-Down Day
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: When rain ruins Leo's perfect plan, he learns to trade grumbles for splashes. A story about cognitive flexibility and finding the fun when things don't go your way.

title: Leo Puddlejump's Best Friend Blunder
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Leo breaks his best friend's favorite toy and must find the courage to tell the truth. A story about honesty, forgiveness, and why friends matter more than things.

title: GalPal Cookbook: Thriving with Alpha-Gal Sensitivity
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: 66 carefully curated alpha-gal safe recipes from breakfast to dinner, with vegan options throughout. Designed for those navigating alpha-gal syndrome without sacrificing flavor.

title: Feather & Fin: A Cookbook for Two, Alpha-Gal Friendly & Flavor-Full
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Quick weeknight meals to impressive date night dinners — all poultry and seafood based, alpha-gal safe. Proves that alpha-gal syndrome doesn't mean sacrificing taste.

title: Too Tired to Stir: Comfort Food for the Chronically Done
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Comforting, easy alpha-gal safe recipes for those days when energy is low but you still need to eat well. Perfect for chronic illness, fatigue, and recovery.

title: Cozy Corner Vibe: Coloring Book
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: A relaxing room coloring book with comfy nooks, hygge decor, and aesthetic interior scenes. Soothing and detailed designs for all ages.

title: Christmas Mandala Adult Coloring Book
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: 50 premium holiday-themed mandalas, decorated trees, and winter scenes. Intricate, sophisticated designs for adults who love detail and a festive meditative escape.

title: Zen Gratitude Journal (Black & Gold)
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: 100 pages of daily gratitude prompts and free-write space in a striking black and gold design. A mindful daily practice in a beautiful package.
